title: Recitals in report of lunacy commissions
doc_html:
§425.  Recitals in report of lunacy commissions

The report of every commission of lunacy shall be prima facie evidence of the facts recited in such report and of the correctness of the findings of such commission.
doc_text:
§425.  Recitals in report of lunacy commissions
The report of every commission of lunacy shall be prima facie evidence of the facts recited in such report and of the correctness of the findings of such commission.
